first_run.rationale: The core reasoning and final score (3/10) are identical in both evaluations. Both correctly identify the candidate as a strong senior individual contributor who lacks the requisite executive leadership and team-scaling experience for a CTO role. The minor differences in wording and the specific resume details highlighted (e.g., Sociomantic vs. Dunnhumby) are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and are not tied to the change in the candidate's university.
